code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn parse_next(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  if i == n
    None
  else
    mut j = i - 1
    mut acc = 0
    mut has = false
    while j < n
      match string.byte_at(s, j)
      when Some(b)
        if is_digit(b)
          acc = acc * 10 + (b - 48)
          has = true
          j = j + 1
        else
          j = n + 1
        end
      when None
        j = n
      end
    end
    if has
      Some(acc)
    else
      None
    end
  end
end

fn find_start(_ s: String, _ from: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = from
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  i
end

fn find_end(_ s: String, _ from: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = from
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_digit(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  i
end

fn read_int(_ s: String, _ lo: Int, _ hi: Int) -> Int
  mut i = lo
  mut acc = 0
  while i < hi
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      acc = acc * 10 + (b - 48)
      i = i + 1
    when None
      i = hi
    end
  end
  acc
end

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let r = x % y
    x = y
    y = r
  end
  x
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let s1 = find_start(input, 0)
let e1 = find_end(input, s1)
let a = read_int(input, s1, e1)
let s2 = find_start(input, e1)
let e2 = find_end(input, s2)
let b = read_int(input, s2, e2)
let g = gcd(a, b)
println("gcd=#{g}")
